title: Ano Poli Student Apartment: Cozy 1-Bed Flat

about.summary: This apartment in Thessaloniki near Ano Poli is located in the Kleious building, at the beginning of Ano Poli, the traditional district of Thessaloniki. It is a fully equipped 25m² private apartment with everything needed for a comfortable stay.

sections.title: 🏠 Ano Poli student apartment
sections.content: Kleious Apartment 1 is designed for practical everyday living and works well for students, Erasmus accommodation, digital nomads and remote workers looking for a private base in Thessaloniki.
highlights: Fully equipped: The apartment has everything needed for a comfortable stay.
Private setup: Entire home arrangement for one guest.
Work-friendly: Dedicated workspace and verified high-speed Wi-Fi are available.

sections.title: 📍 Location near Ano Poli & Tsinari
sections.content: This apartment in Thessaloniki is in the historical center, close to the commercial centre and the traditional Ano Poli – Tsinari area.
highlights: Everything nearby: Supermarket, bakery, marketplace, bus station, restaurant, tavern and cafe are around 50 meters away.
Walkable area: The commercial centre is around a 5-10 minute walk away, so daily bus use is not usually necessary.
Nearby landmarks: Around 5 minutes on foot to Church of Agios Dimitrios, 10 minutes to Aristotelous Square and 14 minutes to Rotunda and Arch of Galerius.
University access: Aristotle University is about 1.2 km away.

sections.title: 🎓 Ideal for Erasmus Students & Remote Workers
sections.content:
This place is ideal for Erasmus accommodation, especially for students coming to Thessaloniki for the Winter or Spring semester. It is also available for digital nomads and remote workers. For official university info, visit Aristotle University and City College.

To compare other properties in the building, view our Erasmus student apartment.

sections.title: Bills & Services
sections.content: Maintenance, water and Wi-Fi are included. Electricity is paid separately. We will be happy to welcome you in Thessaloniki and host you in this studio. For more info, you may reach out through the contact host button.

house_rules.additional_rules_info: Playing musical instruments: not allowed. Not suitable for couples. Tenant type: students and working professionals. Age and gender: no preference.

seo.seo_title: Ano Poli Student Apartment: Cozy 1-Bed Flat
seo.seo_description: Ano Poli student apartment ideal for Erasmus students. This perfect 1-bed base is near Aristotle University, ideal for digital nomads.
